title: Cheyenne Autumn
writer: Mari Sandoz, James R. Webb, Howard Fast
actors: Richard Widmark, Carroll Baker, Karl Malden
plot: The Cheyenne, tired of broken U.S. government promises, head for their ancestral lands but a sympathetic cavalry officer is tasked to bring them back to their reservation.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 3 nominations total
